biological_replicate: A total of 332 mice were used in this study.
experimental_design: The role of KIF3A in extrusion of the first polar body was then examined via microinjection of oocytes with the Kif3a siRNA, with or without simultaneous supplementation of exogenous Myc-Kif3a mRNA.
factor_value: The role of KIF3A in extrusion of the first polar body was then examined via microinjection of oocytes with the Kif3a siRNA, with or without simultaneous supplementation of exogenous Myc-Kif3a mRNA.
